title: eutrema koreanum
intro: Eutrema koreanum, also known as Korean pepperwort, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is native to Korea and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in isothiocyanates, which have been shown to have anti-cancer properties and to improve cardiovascular health. Eutrema koreanum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
